change_notes: Moved 'Freifrau' from name_particles to name_suffix (it is a noble title/honorific, not a connective particle); corrected capitalization of 'von' in family_name to lowercase as it is part of the noble name compound
Separated 'Freiherr' (noble title/suffix) from 'von' (particle); 'Freiherr' moved to name_suffix, 'von' retained in name_particles
Removed 'v.' from name_particles — Sven Hedin does not use a noble particle; 'v.' appears to be erroneous data
Extracted 'Herzog' from family_name to name_prefix, extracted 'von' from family_name to name_particles, leaving 'Mecklenburg' as family_name
Separated 'Freiherr' (noble title/suffix) from 'von' (particle); 'Freiherr' moved to name_suffix, 'von' retained in name_particles
'von Waldegg' is part of the compound family name 'Heusinger von Waldegg', not a connective particle; merged into family_name and cleared name_particles
Moved 'd.J.' from name_particles to name_suffix as it is a generational suffix (der Jüngere/the Younger), not a connective particle
